---
name: Compatibility report
about: Share hardware, runtime, storefront, controller, or multiplayer compatibility results
title: "[Compatibility]: "
labels: compatibility
assignees: ""
---

## What Did You Test?

Describe the setup you tested and whether it worked.

## Result

- [ ] Confirmed working
- [ ] Partially working
- [ ] Not working
- [ ] Needs more testing

## Setup

- Headset model:
- Controller type:
- Runtime used:
- Connection method:
- Storefront:
- Subnautica build:
- Nitrox version:
- SubmersedVR version:
- SubmersedVR-NitroxFix version:
- BepInEx version:
- SteamVR version:

## Multiplayer Result

- Did the game launch in VR?
- Could you join or host a Nitrox server?
- Could VR and flatscreen players play together?
- Did other players see your avatar or animations correctly?

## Controller Result

- Did motion controllers work?
- Did an Xbox or other gamepad work?
- Were any bindings or runtime settings required?

## Setup Steps Or Workarounds

List any special steps required to make this setup work.

## Logs Or Screenshots

Attach logs, screenshots, or short clips if they would help update [Compatibility](../../docs/COMPATIBILITY.md).
